chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-3158 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For order on CMA No.5294/2025 2. For order on CMA No.17824/2023 3. For order on CMA No.16033/2023 4. For order on CMA No.15479/2023 5. For order as to maintainability of petition 18.09.2025 --------- This is an old petition of 2023 which is over two years ago. However, the petitioner is called absent without intimation. This is perhaps because he has moved an application for withdrawal of this petition on 21.08.2023. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as withdrawn alongwith pending application(s). Head of Const. Benches JUDGE Nadir*
